name: 99 to Beat
overview: 100 players compete in unique, funny games. Last-place finishers get eliminated each round. Don't finish last to stay in. Last contestant standing wins $1,000,000.

trailers.title: 99 TO BEAT ALL-NEW 2025 GAME SHOW TV PROMO, PREMIERES SEPTEMBER 24 ON FOX, THANK YOU, DAVID G🙏👍
